title: AIEF: AI-Assisted Ethics Assessment Framework — Ontology, Knowledge Graph, and RAG Pipeline
description: AIEF harmonises AI research ethics requirements from four governance frameworks (TCD REAMS, EU AI Act Article 27 FRIA, Horizon Europe Ethics by Design, ACM/NeurIPS guidelines) into a single OWL ontology and knowledge graph, mapped to EU Charter of Fundamental Rights articles and grounded in 70+ documented AI incidents. This deposit archives the ontology (published at the persistent URI https://w3id.org/aief/), the populated knowledge graph (207 requirements, 70-73 incidents, 342 Charter rights mappings), a SHACL-based scrutable risk-rule layer, and the retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that produces structured, traceable ethics assessments from free-text research proposals.
